plugin_desc: Zenitel Vingtor-Stentofon Exigo and Turbine voice devices SNMP child template. In addition to the shared VoiceGateway SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic, it collects VS-DEVICE-MIB temperature sensors and power-source status from the Zenitel enterprise tree. Fan speed is exposed as RPM and voltage as mV, so they are not promoted into shared fan-state or PSU-voltage health metrics in this pass.
name: VoiceGateway

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: This metric reports the current temperature in degrees Celsius from Zenitel VS-DEVICE-MIB tempCurrentValue, aggregated as the maximum across device sensors. High temperature can indicate cooling or airflow problems in Exigo and Turbine voice devices.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: This metric reports Zenitel power-source status from VS-DEVICE-MIB powerStatus, normalized so connected(3) is 1 = healthy and every other or unknown value is 2 = fault. It is aggregated as the maximum across power sources so any abnormal source is visible.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
